title: More Optimize+
description: This mod pack will add more performance, fps, etc. to your computer or laptop.
body:
# **🧩 More Optimize+ — Maximum Performance, Zero Lag!**

More Optimize+ is a carefully tuned Minecraft modpack designed for players who want higher FPS, fewer lags, and a smoother gameplay experience — even on low-end PCs.
With a handpicked selection of optimization and performance mods, it boosts your game's speed, improves memory usage, and enhances visuals without changing the vanilla feel.

## ⚙️ Main Features:

- 🎨 Shader Support

- 🔗 Optimized Network

- 🚀 Up to +200% FPS boost compared to vanilla Minecraft

- 🧠 Better CPU and memory optimization

## 🔧 Recommended For:

- Players with low or mid-end PCs
